title: Phalacraea callitricha
taxonomy: Phalacraea callitricha belongs to the family Pteromalidae and is classified as a species of chalcid wasp. It is a type of parasitic wasp that belongs to the order Hymenoptera. Phalacraea callitricha is further classified as a member of the genus Phalacraea. The classification of this species is based on its morphology and genetic characteristics. This wasp is thought to be a parasitoid of certain insect species.
